label: Principal Software Engineer - AI Product & Platform (Synergy)
headline: Principal Software Engineer — AI Systems, Full-Stack Architecture, & High-Reliability Platforms

ai-research.title: Principal AI Researcher & Engineer
description: Architected and implemented production-ready AI agent frameworks and RAG workflows using Python and C#/.NET, focusing on deterministic scope boundaries and traceable execution.
Developed the Domain of Domains (DoD), a formal runtime governance architecture for agentic systems addressing context drift and unverifiable memory in complex LLM environments.
Built BookForge, a Python-based AI workflow engine with a layered prompt governance pipeline, multi-provider LLM abstraction (OpenAI, Gemini, Ollama), and schema-validated state management.
Authored comprehensive technical decision records and architecture whitepapers for agentic coding and governance planes, ensuring knowledge sharing and system sustainability.

iadvantage.title: Lead Developer / Technical Architect
description: Led the technical direction and delivery of a GLP-compliant lab platform in a highly regulated environment where data integrity and audit trails were critical requirements.
Shaped architecture and implementation across front-end (AngularJS/Bootstrap), APIs (REST/OData), and data (Oracle/PL-SQL) to support high-value product features.
Managed release engineering and Azure DevOps practices, ensuring reliability across both internet-connected and complex environment-specific deployments.
Mentored the development team through code reviews and technical guidance, maintaining high standards for production quality and maintainability.

storable.title: Senior Software Engineer (Backend & Services)
description: Architected .NET Core services using Entity Framework over PostgreSQL and SQL Server to drive high-availability insurance workflows.
Built background processing systems with Hangfire to synchronize eligibility and billing data across distributed web and desktop products.
Collaborated closely with product leadership to triage production issues and refactor high-risk architectural areas for long-term sustainability.

prestage-farms.title: Principal Programmer / Analyst
description: Led a team of engineers to modernize critical inventory and accounting systems, delivering high-value product features three months ahead of schedule.
Designed and implemented role-based security and reporting engines for on-premise environments, ensuring operational stability during system cutovers.
Balanced speed and quality by implementing pragmatic automation and bug-tracking pipelines that reduced delivery bottlenecks.

solid-earth.title: Technical Architect
description: Developed and optimized high-performance RETS client/server software on Oracle and C#, achieving industry-leading compliance and responsiveness.
Architected configurable ASP.NET platforms where business rules and UI branding were driven by extensible data schemas, reducing individual code changes per customer.
